READY
Demo ready. Start the admissions demo call below, then use the walkthrough CTA to review where after-hours handoff can improve.

Fallback workflow prepared with low-confidence fields marked

We only use confirmed information from your public website. We never fabricate clinical details, insurance acceptance, or bed availability. If we can’t verify something, we mark it unknown rather than guess.

COMPLIANCE-AWARE WORKFLOW DESIGN
We could not fully verify every website detail, so this preview uses a standard after-hours admissions workflow with factual fields kept conservative.

PERSONALIZED AGENT

QA Recovery Center · After-Hours Admissions AI

The call captures non-clinical intake, checks for immediate danger, and prepares the admissions handoff without making medical or admission promises.
